product.name: ArWoWear T0 Soft
product.familyDescriptorPl: Lekkie miękkie robocze — biel i pastele
product.familyDescriptorEn: Light soft workwear — whites and pastels
product.categorySourceGroup: Scrub and shirt fabrics for medical wear.
descriptions: ArWoWear T0 Soft is light weight 130 g/m², 80% cotton 20% polyester medical twill fabric. It is the most used fabric for medical wear with high cotton confort and polyester durability.
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>800N; Weft>600N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>20N; Weft>15N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Hot Press Fastness | 4 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Water and Oil Repellent | 4 | EN ISO 4920

evidence: categorySourceGroup: Scrub and shirt fabrics for medical wear.
description: 'the most used fabric for medical wear'
acceptedMatches.rationale: Product is explicitly categorized as medical scrub/shirt fabric and described as the most used fabric for medical wear.

evidence: categorySourceGroup: Scrub and shirt fabrics for medical wear.
description: 'the most used fabric for medical wear'
primary.rationale: Product is explicitly categorized as medical scrub/shirt fabric, described as the most used fabric for medical wear with cotton comfort and polyester durability.

secondary.rationale: No independent secondary application is supported; application field states 'Shirts' which aligns with medical scrub shirts, not a separate sector.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Generic shirt fabric but explicit category and description point specifically to medical wear, a narrower and more direct application.
